items.title: ZOETIS DEADLINE: ROSEN, RECOGNIZED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Zoetis Inc. Investors with Losses in Excess of $100K to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – ZTS
items.summary: Rosen Law Firm is notifying Zoetis Inc. investors who purchased securities between January 14, 2025 and May 6, 2026 of an important July 27, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline in an ongoing securities class action. The lawsuit alleges that Zoetis made false statements about market share and sales growth while failing to disclose weakening adoption of flagship products Librela and Simparica Trio, as well as market share losses in dermatology products due to FDA safety warnings and increased competition.
